global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent logo, a main message, and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting fresh food options with a strong call to action.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire banner, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'PlateSprint' in a bold font, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Hungry? We got you' in a large, bold font, centered in the middle of the banner.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that reads 'Fresh favorites nearby' in a lighter font.

elements.label: Image placeholders
elements.description: Three rectangular shapes representing image placeholders, arranged horizontally in the center of the banner.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom center of the banner with the text 'Start now' in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The text 'PlateSprint' displayed prominently at the top of the banner in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: CTA button
elements.description: A clear, inviting button at the bottom of the banner with the text 'Start now' in a bold font.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the main message is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you, Fresh favorites nearby, PlateSprint, SALE, Start now
